name: quioteframework/session-pdo
description: PDO-backed session storage for Quiote: a SessionPersistenceInterface implementation for SessionManager, plus a native SessionHandlerInterface implementation for the legacy Storage subsystem.

extra.quiote-monorepo-note: Developed in-tree under quioteframework/quiote's packages/session-pdo/; split to this standalone repo via splitsh/lite on tag push. PRs go to the monorepo, not here.
